reasoning: FIDE only publishes its official rankings on the 1st of every month. The Wikipedia page 'FIDE rankings' tracks these official monthly lists and is updated shortly after they are released. Since the two dates in question are March 15 and March 22, both fall within the same official FIDE ranking period (March 2026). No new official list will be released between these two dates, and thus the Wikipedia page will not undergo a ranking update. Carissa Yip's ranking will be exactly the same (likely 14) on both March 15 and March 22. 'As high or higher' includes equality, meaning the exact same rank fulfills the resolution criteria. Unless there is bizarre vandalism, retroactive FIDE rank correction, or Wikipedia editors mistakenly applying early April lists over a week early (which FIDE itself doesn't even publish yet), the page will remain identical.
